data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Research files no longer exist
  Verify: ! test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/llm-debugging-agent.md && ! test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/llm-debugging-research.md
- [ ] Archive doc still exists (pre-existing, verified)
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/archive/debugging-research-2026-03-18.md

## test-exempt justification
Static asset removal (unit exemption criterion 3), no conditional logic (criterion 1)
